hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASP compliance teams consolidate audit evidence from multiple providers into one structured workflow that improves review traceability and reduces manual overhead.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit evidence remains scattered across tools
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain a clear and connected audit trail when provider outputs and evidence are stored in disconnected systems. This fragmentation slows review processes and complicates the reconstruction of decision history during audits or regulatory inspections.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, review actions, decision logs and evidence into a single operational layer so compliance teams can trace and reconstruct audit histories with clarity and consistency.
workflow_title: From provider checks to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes fragmented provider outputs through rules, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to build a coherent compliance audit trail.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented data silos. Audit-ready evidence control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured cases, decisions and audit evidence to reduce manual workload and support defensible compliance workflows for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in unifying provider outputs into governed compliance workflows with preserved evidence and scalable deployment for clearer audit and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help connect audit evidence across providers
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how fragmented checks become integrated case evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit logs preserve compliance decisions and workflow
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY supports provider orchestration and case review
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY break audit evidence silos?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into one connected compliance workflow, linking alerts, cases, evidence and reports to reduce manual workload and improve traceability.
faq_2_question: How are compliance cases managed in SFTY?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures compliance cases by connecting alerts, provider results, decisions and evidence in a controlled workflow with review history and escalation paths.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence to maintain an audit-ready record for regulatory and internal reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing providers, integrating outputs from KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools into one operational compliance layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing providers by turning their outputs into structured workflows without replacing KYC, KYT or other compliance vendors.
final_title: Turn fragmented evidence into connected cases
final_description: Review how SFTY connects multiple provider outputs into structured audit trails, decision logs and consolidated case workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
